specific_question: Based on the most recent internal compliance reports, is the company on track to meet the 2035 100% ZEV mandate in California?
answer: Based on the 2025 compliance review, Elexion Automotive already covers 60% of the new CARB ACC II mandate criteria. The internal consensus is that the company is on track to be fully compliant with the new mandate.
